creator: pizzamig@freebsd.org
text:
I've committed sccache 0.5.3 in the portstree (https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=28806b7fc25c2614c9e45a4ef7b26323ea77c94e), but I forgot I to link this Bug report in the commit.

I've also built it with openssl 3.1 (from ports) and it worked.

The current failing tests seems related to missing/wrong configuration.

I'll investigate more in the next days, but it seems usable
